---
title: "Etabli Projet"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-projet.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Self-hosted client</span>

> Your OpenProject work packages in your pocket.

Etabli Projet is a native iOS and Android client for a self-hosted OpenProject instance. Browse work packages, filter, assign to a person or update status — straight against your own server. The app speaks OpenProject's official HAL+JSON API with bearer-token authentication.

![Projet — login screen with server URL and API token.](../_screens/android-login.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Teams self-hosting OpenProject, and individuals who, on the move, need to update a status, claim a task, or look up an upcoming due date.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. Sign-in happens on your self-hosted OpenProject server. Credentials (URL + API token) live only in the platform secure store (iOS Keychain · Android EncryptedSharedPreferences) and only go to the configured instance.

## Installation

| Platform | Source |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | App Store |
| Android  | Google Play and F-Droid (main repository) |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
